title: bauhinia storkii
intro: Bauhinia storkii, also known as the Stork's bill or Taiwan orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia storkii include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
